chosen_action.title: Repair StackOverflow search fallback suppression and rerun the lane

why_this_action.summary: The current review window had no truthful do-now packet, but StackOverflow remained the best high-intent demand-capture lane if the search runtime could stop suppressing excerpt fallback behind weak primary matches.
supporting_reasons: The latest execution board said there was no truthful do-now packet and explicitly allowed a concrete runtime/process repair during the hold window.
The StackOverflow packet had already been delivered and retired for the current review window, so another packet refresh or manual re-delivery would be fake progress.
Live curator, publisher, Apollo, and directory lanes were already inside active measurement/reply windows, so same-family packet churn would not create fresh measurable demand.

The StackOverflow runtime only used excerpt fallback when advanced search returned zero results, so one low-fit primary hit could hide better fallback candidates and understate live demand-capture opportunities.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: StackOverflow packet already exhausted in the current review window
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet; repair allowed during hold
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement remains the primary success gate
stackoverflow_answer_lane_latest.json: latest lane state still under-delivering fresh placement-ready outcomes

result.summary: Patched the StackOverflow lane to pass rich query text into advanced search and to merge excerpt fallback whenever primary API hits do not already contain a live-fit candidate; verified with 19 passing unit tests and reran the lane.
blocking_factors: The repaired live rerun still found zero fresh StackOverflow candidates at 2026-05-28T02:30:19.972298, so the board remains in truthful measurement-hold state until a different lane clears or new demand appears.
